query:
SELECT orderNo, customerName, deliveryCourse, paymentAmount, orderType, status, createdAt 
FROM orders 
WHERE deliveryCourse LIKE '%会员费%' OR deliveryCourse LIKE '%会员%' OR orderType = 'membership'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT orderNo, customerName, deliveryCourse, paymentAmount, orderType, status, createdAt 
FROM orders 
WHERE deliveryCourse LIKE '%会员费%' OR deliveryCourse LIKE '%会员%' OR orderType = 'membership'
